notes: - Fixed bug that caused Unknown to show for the character name in the loadout list for loadouts imported under a character that was created in the import menu.
- Fixed bug that caused popups for update checker, importing, and exporting loadouts to show in both the gear selection widget and the totals/details pane.
- Update Checker now checks for an update on app startup rather than having a 24H cooldown that is cached.
- Updates can now additionally be checked for manually with a new Check for Updates button in the UI.
- Added a manual Check for Updates button at the bottom of the Class/Spec pane for users to be able to manually check for app updates while the app is open.
